LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF JAMES SALINAS SR NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO DISQUALIFY ARBITRATOR PURSUANT TO PLAINTIFF JAMES SALINAS SR.'S MOTION TO DISQUALIFY ARBITRATOR PURSUANT TO CCP 1281.9, 1281.91 AND STAY ARBITRATION BETWEEN PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL IS HEARD. THE COURT GRANTS DISQUALIFICATION, BECAUSE MCKAY DID NOT COMPLY WITH CCP 1281.9(A)(3) AND (A)(4). PARTIES TO COMPLY WITH ALTERNATE ARBITRATOR SELECTION AS FOUND IN CMA. ARBITRATION CLAUSE NOT UNCONSCIONABLE AND COURT SEVERS FEE PROVISION. COUNSEL TO SUBMIT ORDERS TO THE COURT. JUDGE: PAUL H. ALVARADO, REPORTER: CONNIE J. PARCHMAN, CSR 6137

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Disqualify Arbitrator Pursuant To Ccp 1281.9, 1281.91 And Stay Arbitration Between Pltf And Deft Northern California Carpenters Regional Council
Off Calendar Jan-23-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF JAMES SALINAS SR Notice Of Motion And Motion To Disqualify Arbitrator Pursuant To PLAINTIFF JAMES SALINAS SR.'S Motion To Disqualify Arbitrator Pursuant To CCP 1281.9, 1281.91 And Stay Arbitration Between Plaintiff And Defendant Northern California Carpenters Regional Council.
Appearances: Sandra Rae Benson, Esq. of Weinberg, Roger & Rosenfeld, (510) 337-1001, Appearing for Defendant Northern California Carpenters Regional counsel; and opposing party; Steven P. Shaw, of Renne Sloan Holtzman Salai LLP, (415) 678-3836; appearing for Plaintiff and moving party, James Salinas; Mara E. Rosales, Public Law Group, Renne Soan Holtzman Sakai LLP, (415) 678-3800 appearing for Plaintiff, James Salinas, Sr., and moving party. Hearing Held and argued. Ruling: The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: GRANT DISQUALIFICATION, BECAUSE MCKAY DID NOT COMPLY WITH CCP 1281.9(a)(3) and (a)(4). PARTIES TO COMPLY WITH ALTERNATE ARBITRATOR SELECTION AS FOUND IN CMA. ARBITRATION CLAUSE NOT UNCONSCIONABLE AND COURT SEVERS FEE PROVISION. Counsel to submit Orders to the Court. (302/PHA/PB)Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Reporter: Connie J. Parchman, CSR 6137

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Disqualify Arbitrator Pursuant To Ccp 1281.9, 1281.91 And Stay Arbitration Between Pltf And Deft Northern California Carpenters Regional Council
